headline: Apple's $599 MacBook Neo May Boost Revenue By 0.5% While Expanding Into Student Market, Gene Munster Says
summary: The launch of MacBook Neo — the most affordable laptop ever from Apple Inc. — could slightly lift overall revenue while helping the tech giant win over a new generation of student users, according to analyst Gene Munster. Apple Targets Students With Its Cheapest Mac Yet On Wednesday, Apple unveiled the MacBook Neo with a starting price of $599, or $499 for education customers, marking a dramatic drop from the previous entry-level Mac price of about $999. headline: Warren Buffett's Final Top 10 Stock Holdings: Which Ones Will Greg Abel Likely Sell?
summary: Berkshire Hathaway Inc has a new CEO, and Wall Street is watching his every move. Here’s what Greg Abel‘s early commentary suggests about the fate of Warren Buffett‘s top 10 holdings. Berkshire Hathaway's Top 10 Stock Holdings In the fourth quarter, Berkshire under then-CEO Buffett took a new position in the New York Times and adjusted positions in several of the company's top holdings. At the end of 2025, these were the top 10 stock holdings in the conglomerate’s investment portfolio: Apple Inc

headline: Asana’s new CEO says getting a job in Silicon Valley isn’t harder for Gen Z than it was for him—he shares his own ‘donut box’ hack for getting hired
summary: Exclusive: Gen Z is resorting to donut-box résumés, cold emails, and viral stunts to break into tech—but Dan Rogers, the new CEO of the $1.8 billion workflow software company Asana, says the real hack is slower and far less flashy
